john@example.com.health_tips:
📋 About: Migraine is a type of headache that often involves severe pain and sensitivity to light and sound.

💊 Recommended Medications:
  • Analgesics
  • Triptans
  • Ergotamine derivatives
  • Preventive medications
  • Biofeedback

🥗 Dietary Recommendations:
  • Migraine Diet
  • Low-Tyramine Diet
  • Caffeine withdrawal
  • Hydration
  • Magnesium-rich foods

⚠️ Precautions:
  • Meditation
  • Reduce stress
  • Use poloroid glasses in sun
  • Consult doctor

🏃 Lifestyle & Exercise:
  • Identify and avoid trigger foods
  • Stay hydrated
  • Include magnesium-rich foods
  • Consume omega-3 fatty acids
  • Limit caffeine and alcohol
